nasb.text: They went out into the field and gathered the grapes of their vineyards and trod them, and held a festival; and they went into the house of their god, and ate and drank and cursed Abimelech.

esv.text: And they went out into the field and gathered the grapes from their vineyards and trod them and held a festival; and they went into the house of their god and ate and drank and reviled Abimelech.

cnv.text: 他們出到田間去，收取葡萄，榨酒，舉行慶祝會，進入他們的神廟吃喝，並且咒詛亞比米勒。

ccb.text: 示剑人出城到田间采摘葡萄，踩榨葡萄汁，然后在他们的神庙中欢宴，尽情吃喝，咒诅亚比米勒。
